---
title: "Indonesian Inflation Tracker"
subtitle: "Monthly CPI and component breakdown, 2015–2024"
date: 2025-03-01
categories: [Macroeconomics, Interactive, lang:English]
description: "An interactive tracker of Indonesian consumer price inflation by component — food, energy, core — using BPS CPI data from 2015 to 2024."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Placeholder — replace with your Shiny or Observable embed.
